results.rendered_html:
ḍhakkā
1 A large or double drum; na te huḍukkena na sopi ḍhakkayā na mardalaiḥ sāpi na te'pi ḍhakkayā ..  N. 15. 17. 
2 Coveting.
3 Disappearance.
